payload.task_preview:
Book a venue for 12 people in Haymarket, Edinburgh, Friday 2026-04-25 at 19:30.

WORKFLOW (loop half only — every planner subgoal MUST use assigned_half: "loop"):
1. venue_search — if nothing fits 12

payload.summary: venue_search(Haymarket, party=12, budget≤£1000): 0 results — venues exist in Haymarket but none fit your constraints. In Haymarket: Haymarket Tap (8 seats, floor £200; blocked: party_size (max 8 seats)). Relax party_size or raise budget_max_gbp, or pick a different venue from this list.
